Tea/Snacks {{ hostelInfo?.messTiming?.snacks || '4:00 PM - 5:00 PM' }}

Warden Office {{ hostelInfo?.officeHours?.warden || '9:00 AM - 5:00 PM' }}
Front Desk {{ hostelInfo?.officeHours?.frontDesk || '24/7' }}
Maintenance {{ hostelInfo?.officeHours?.maintenance || '8:00 AM - 6:00 PM' }}
📋 Hostel Rules
Gate Closing {{ hostelInfo?.hostelRules?.gateClosing || '10:00 PM' }}
Quiet Hours {{ hostelInfo?.hostelRules?.quietHours || '10:00 PM - 7:00 AM' }}
Visitor Hours {{ hostelInfo?.hostelRules?.visitorHours || '10:00 AM - 7:00 PM' }}

Warden {{ hostelInfo?.emergencyContact?.warden || '+91-XXXX-XXXX' }}
Security {{ hostelInfo?.emergencyContact?.security || '+91-XXXX-XXXX' }}
